description: Well-known sources for AI policy file conventions. Maintained by aipolicy.1mb.dev.

sources.name: AGENTS.md Specification
sources.description: The AGENTS.md convention for AI coding agent instructions. Supported by Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and others.

sources.name: Linux Foundation AI Policy Guidance
sources.description: Linux Foundation guidance on AI governance for open-source projects.

sources.name: CNCF AI Practices
sources.description: CNCF ecosystem practices around AI policy adoption in cloud-native projects.

sources.name: Kubewarden AI Policy
sources.description: Early adopter of AI_POLICY.md in the CNCF ecosystem.

sources.name: CloudNativePG AI Usage Policy
sources.description: Structured AI usage policy with contributor guidelines.

sources.name: Kyverno AI Policy
sources.description: Comprehensive AI policy with disclosure requirements and enforcement.
